user_comment: This feed allows you to read the blogs from this site in any feed reader that supports the JSON Feed format.

items.title: thanks mikael - this is cool!
items.summary: listening to Blues Radio in my terminal :)
items.content_html:
CLIAMP (github)

A retro music player inspired by Winamp, built for the terminal. Spectrum visualizer, 10-band EQ, playlists, streaming, and more.

[ 📌mikael ]
